name: Pricing
description: Cornerstone pricing with property risks and reinsurance structure

content.description: Cornerstone pricing with property risks and reinsurance structure
content.configuration: config => config.WithContentType<Pricing>().AddContentCollection(sp => { var hub = sp.GetRequiredService<IMessageHub>(); var pricingId = hub.Address.Id; var basePath = System.IO.Path.Combine("../../samples/Graph/attachments/Cornerstone", hub.Address.Segments[1], hub.Address.Segments[2], "Submissions"); return new ContentCollectionConfig { SourceType = FileSystemStreamProvider.SourceType, Name = $"Submissions@{pricingId}", BasePath = basePath, DisplayName = "Submission Files" }; }).AddData(data => data.AddSource(source => { var hub = source.Workspace.Hub; var pricingId = hub.Address.Id; var insuredName = hub.Address.Segments[1]; var isMicrosoft = insuredName == "Microsoft"; return source.WithType<LineOfBusiness>(t => t.WithInitialData(LineOfBusiness.All)).WithType<Country>(t => t.WithInitialData(Country.All)).WithType<Currency>(t => t.WithInitialData(Currency.All)).WithType<LegalEntity>(t => t.WithInitialData(LegalEntity.All)).WithType<PricingStatus>(t => t.WithInitialData(PricingStatus.All)).WithType<PropertyRisk>(t => isMicrosoft ? t.WithInitialData(() => MicrosoftDataLoader.LoadPropertyRisks(hub)) : t.WithInitialData(Array.Empty<PropertyRisk>())).WithType<ReinsuranceAcceptance>(t => isMicrosoft ? t.WithInitialData(() => MicrosoftDataLoader.LoadReinsuranceAcceptances(hub, pricingId)) : t.WithInitialData(Array.Empty<ReinsuranceAcceptance>())).WithType<ReinsuranceSection>(t => isMicrosoft ? t.WithInitialData(() => MicrosoftDataLoader.LoadReinsuranceSections(hub, pricingId)) : t.WithInitialData(Array.Empty<ReinsuranceSection>())).WithType<ExcelImportConfiguration>(t => t.WithInitialData(isMicrosoft ? MicrosoftSampleData.ImportConfigs : Array.Empty<ExcelImportConfiguration>())); })).AddDefaultLayoutAreas().AddLayout(layout => layout.WithDefaultArea("Overview").AddPricingLayoutAreas())
